html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

The Brightshade Staff is a ranged Weapon exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. It can only be crafted while next to the Brightsmithy, requiring 3 Pure Brilliance and 6 Brightshade Husks to craft.

When used, the Brightshade Staff fires a homing projectile that deals 10 Planar Damage and bounces between targets 4 times to hit at maximum 5 times. Planar damage pierces through the protection of worn Armor and Planar Entity Protection. If the Brightshade Helm is equipped, the Brightshade Staff will bounce between targets 6 times instead of 4 to hit at maximum 7 times.

When bouncing between targets, the Brightshade Staff's projectile simply prefers to move towards the mob closest to it. The projectile cannot hit the same target twice in a row.

The Brightshade Staff deals 20 planar damage to Shadow Aligned creatures instead of 10.

When the Brightshade Staff's durability reaches 0%, it does not disappear; instead, it is unequipped and can no longer be equipped until repaired. It can be fully repaired by one Brightshade Repair Kit.

Tips

  • While wearing an Enlightened Crown socketed with five Celestial Jewels, the wearer's Sanity is locked to 100%. In this state, every hit from a Brightshade Staff releases a Minor Gestalt, resulting in extraordinary damage potential against multiple targets. This is especially useful against Hound Waves or tough fights like the Possessed Varg.

Gallery

  • Brightshade Staff on ground.
  • Broken Brightshade Staff on water.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

“Plant power!”
–Wilson
“This magic stuff is easy!”
–Willow
“Is planty magic stick.”
–Wolfgang
“It will help me make sure no one gets too close.”
–Wendy
“PROJECTILE MAGIC”
–WX-78
“It allows the user to attack from afar.”
–Wickerbottom
“Some kinda plant magic.”
–Woodie
“More magic to add to the arsenal.”
–Maxwell
“To attack from afar is not my preferred way of combat.”
–Wigfrid
“We can hit things far away.”
–Webber
“I could stir up some real trouble with this.”
–Warly
“Mean stick”
–Wormwood
“Another magical doodad?”
–Winona
“With a flick of the wrist, someone's getting hit.”
–Wortox
“Magic hitting stick.”
–Wurt
“Yup, that's definitely magical.”
–Walter
“I prefer keeping everything at a distance.”
–Wanda
The Brightshade Staff is a ranged Weapon exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. It can only be crafted while next to the Brightsmithy, requiring 3 Pure Brilliance and 6 Brightshade Husks to craft.
When used, the Brightshade Staff fires a homing projectile that deals 10 Planar Damage and bounces between targets 4 times to hit at maximum 5 times. Planar damage pierces through the protection of worn Armor and Planar Entity Protection. If the Brightshade Helm is equipped, the Brightshade Staff will bounce between targets 6 times instead of 4 to hit at maximum 7 times.
When bouncing between targets, the Brightshade Staff's projectile simply prefers to move towards the mob closest to it. The projectile cannot hit the same target twice in a row.
The Brightshade Staff deals 20 planar damage to Shadow Aligned creatures instead of 10.
When the Brightshade Staff's durability reaches 0%, it does not disappear; instead, it is unequipped and can no longer be equipped until repaired. It can be fully repaired by one Brightshade Repair Kit.
Tips[edit | edit source]
While wearing an Enlightened Crown socketed with five Celestial Jewels, the wearer's Sanity is locked to 100%. In this state, every hit from a Brightshade Staff releases a Minor Gestalt, resulting in extraordinary damage potential against multiple targets. This is especially useful against Hound Waves or tough fights like the Possessed Varg.

20 (vs [[Shadow Aligned]])}} {{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}} {{Rift Content|Lunar Rift}} {{Quotes |wilson = Plant power! |willow = This magic stuff is easy! |wolfgang = Is planty magic stick. |wendy = It will help me make sure no one gets too close. |wx78 = PROJECTILE MAGIC |wickerbottom = It allows the user to attack from afar. |woodie = Some kinda plant magic. |maxwell = More magic to add to the arsenal. |wigfrid = To attack from afar is not my preferred way of combat. |webber = We can hit things far away. |warly = I could stir up some real trouble with this. |wormwood = Mean stick |winona = Another magical doodad? |wortox = With a flick of the wrist, someone's getting hit. |wurt = Magic hitting stick. |walter = Yup, that's definitely magical. |wanda = I prefer keeping everything at a distance. |choose = wanda}} The '''Brightshade Staff''' is a ranged [[Weapon]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[From Beyond]]''. It can only be crafted while next to the [[Brightsmithy]], requiring 3 [[Pure Brilliance]] and 6 [[Brightshade Husk]]s to craft. When used, the Brightshade Staff fires a homing projectile that deals 10 [[Planar Damage]] and bounces between targets 4 times to hit at maximum 5 times. Planar damage pierces through the protection of worn [[Armor]] and [[Planar Entity Protection]]. If the [[Brightshade Helm]] is equipped, the Brightshade Staff will bounce between targets 6 times instead of 4 to hit at maximum 7 times. When bouncing between targets, the Brightshade Staff's projectile simply prefers to move towards the mob closest to it. The projectile cannot hit the same target twice in a row. The Brightshade Staff deals 20 planar damage to [[Shadow Aligned]] creatures instead of 10. When the Brightshade Staff's durability reaches 0%, it does not disappear; instead, it is unequipped and can no longer be equipped until repaired. It can be fully repaired by one [[Brightshade Repair Kit]]. == {{Pic|32|Prototype}} Tips == * While wearing an [[Enlightened Crown]] socketed with five [[Celestial Jewel]]s, the wearer's Sanity is locked to 100%. In this state, every hit from a Brightshade Staff releases a Minor Gestalt, resulting in extraordinary damage potential against multiple targets. This is especially useful against [[Hound Wave/DST|Hound Waves]] or tough fights like the [[Possessed Varg]]. == {{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Brightshade Staff on ground.gif|Brightshade Staff on ground.
